title: Bounded Public-Host API Origin Remediation Planning
objective: Define the smallest truthful source-local remediation slice for the Operations Visibility public static surfaces so they stop hardcoding localhost API bases on non-local hosts while preserving the explicit boundary that public-host backend availability is still unresolved.
decision_rationale: The current browser failure is still controlled by the public static asset code because those pages hardcode `http://localhost:8000` on every host except the integration dashboard.

A direct same-origin probe against `https://operations.apexpowerops.com/api/v1/schedule/projects` and `/api/v1/reads/approval-queue` returned `404`, so origin-aware remediation will fix the wrong-origin dependency but will not by itself prove live-data readiness.

The smallest truthful implementation slice is therefore source-local and narrow: replace the hardcoded localhost bases in the public PM review and lead surfaces with the existing local-vs-public origin-aware pattern already used by `integration-dashboard/index.html`.

This admits a clean validation outcome: the pages should stop requesting localhost from a public browser surface, while any remaining failures should accurately reflect public-host API absence rather than a false browser origin assumption.
implementation_scope: Patch `apps/operations-web/public/pm-review/drivers.js`, `schedule.js`, `tracer.js`, and `variance.js` to resolve their schedule API base using a local-vs-public origin-aware branch.

Patch `apps/operations-web/public/pm-review/approval-surface.html` and `apps/operations-web/public/lead-ops/index.html` to resolve reads and mutations bases with the same local-vs-public origin-aware branch.
Use `apps/operations-web/public/integration-dashboard/index.html` as the nearest implementation reference.
Do not claim live-data success unless post-change validation shows the public-host API routes actually respond successfully.
success_criteria: The planning record names the exact source files that own the wrong-origin behavior.
The selected implementation slice remains source-local and bounded.
The planning record preserves the truthful boundary that public-host API availability is still unproven and currently 404 on direct probe.
next_packet_candidate: Olares Dev Residency 025 - Bounded Public Static Surface API Origin Remediation Execution
closure_note: Executed 2026-05-05 as a bounded planning packet. Packet 024 selected a source-local remediation slice that removes hardcoded localhost API bases from the public static Operations Visibility surfaces while explicitly preserving that the public-host API routes currently return 404 on direct probe and therefore live-data success remains out of scope until separately proven.
next_action: Execute Packet 025 as the bounded source-local API-origin remediation slice and validate that public browser requests no longer target localhost.
